snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


“Timi Ho”  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

“Timi Ho” is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr
snippet.description:
Laughter, screams, and surprises are waiting inside the Bangla. Dare to enter? 🤣🧟‍♀️
#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 👻

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Farahjaan Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati namm
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Huaa ye kya hashar mera
Judaa huaa sabar mera
Main tere bin ek lamha
Kyun kabhi naa jiya

Raat bhar ashqo ne tujhko pukara hai
Har dua main maine tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam...

Nasha tera dil ko lagaa
Dena nahi mujhko dagaa
Main teri aadat ka maara
Hai kya meri khataa

Tere bin naamumkin
Apna guzaara hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aakhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

snippet.title: KISAAN BAHURIYA OFFICIAL TRAILER I किसान बहुरिया I ANJANA SINGH I PRASHANT SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #khushijha #golutiwari #kisaanbahuriya #manjulthakur #omjha #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpurisuperhitmovie 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म –  किसान बहुरिया (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – अंजना  सिंह  , प्रशांत  सिंह  , ख़ुशी झा  , विद्या  सिंह  , गोलू  तिवारी  , अशोक  मिश्रा  , सुधा  यादव  
बाल कलाकार - दीक्षा मिश्रा
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक   - अरबिंद तिवारी  
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी , प्यारे लाल यादव 
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - दास स्टूडियो
प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय  , सोनू  मिश्रा 
लोकल  प्रोडक्शन  –  मुकेश  दुबे  ,कमलेश  सिंह, दुष्यंत   सिंह   
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – नज़ीर शेख
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव

B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा 

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  -
 प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी 

B4U - फाइनेंस-
 संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

FILM- KISAAN BAHURIYA (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- Anjana singh , Prashant singh , Khushijha , Vidhya singh , Golu tiwari , Ashok Mishra , Sudha Yadav , 
CHILD ARTIST – DIKSHA MISHRA 
DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER - ARBIND TIWARI 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA 
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI, PYARE LAL YADAV
EDITOR- SAMEER SHAIKH, ZAHEED KHAN
CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN 
CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- NAZEER SHAIKH 
POST PRODUCTION – DAS STUDIO
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN ROY , SONU MISHRA
LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH  
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, MANJUL THAKUR
Music, satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE, MORE
OFFICE BOY - KANHAIYA JHA

IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , GANESH MAHADEV TAPRE , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY


B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI, SAKSHI SHELAR

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge - AARI AARI | Ranveer Singh | Shashwat Sachdev, Bombay Rockers | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Get ready to witness the sound of revenge. ❤️‍🔥

Presenting #AariAari, the powerful new track from #DhurandharTheRevenge.

With electrifying music, intense energy, and commanding vocals, this track brings the spirit of revenge alive like never before.
Listen now and feel the unstoppable energy of #AariAari. 🔥

Credits: 
Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE

Written, Directed and Produced by: Aditya Dhar
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by: Lokesh Dhar

Cast : Ranveer Singh | Sanjay Dutt | R. Madhavan | Arjun Rampal | Sara Arjun

A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

♪Full Song Available on♪ 
JioSaavn: https://bit.ly/4dhocKu
Spotify: https://bit.ly/3P4WOp9
Apple Music: https://bit.ly/3NmhDM5
Gaana: https://bit.ly/40u1zLn

Audio Credits
Song name : Dhurandhar The Revenge - Aari Aari
Music : Shashwat Sachdev
Produced and Arranged: Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers),Shashwat Sachdev,Khan Saab,Jasmine Sandlas,Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and Written by: Reble, Token

Mix and mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge Mumbai @ SoundRoof Studios Hyderabad

Music Label - T-Series

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Ghaamchhaya | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
This is me and the band performing “Ghaamchhaya” live at GhaamChhaya Intimate. It’s the title track from the album “GhaamChhaya,” and it talks about how someone’s absence can truly hurt. Accepting it hurts even more. I really love this song, and I hope you do too.

Stream GhaamChhaya on all streaming platforms now 

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra
2D Effects Artist: Ina Choi

'Arirang' Composer & Piano: Goldbranch
Sound Designer: Jang Mi Ra

#BTS #방탄소년단 #BTS_ARIRANG

snippet.title: Sirima Siri – Suman KC & Melina Rai | Ft. Puspa Khadka , Asmita Shrestha | Nepali Romantic Song 2025
snippet.description:
Sirima Siri – New Nepali Romantic Song 2025

Presenting the official music video of "Sirima Siri" by Suman KC & Melina Rai featuring Puspa Khadka and Asmita Shrestha.

Only on Suman KC Official YouTube Channel.

🎵 Song Credits:
▶️ Singer: Melina Rai & Suman KC  
▶️ Lyrics: Dipendra Khadka  
▶️ Music: Dipendra Thing   
▶️ Music Arrang : Suman KC
▶️ Mixed / Master :  Suman KC 
▶️ Studio : The Peak 
▶️ Cast: Puspa Khadka, Asmita Shrestha  
▶️ Editor: Nishan Ghimire  
▶️ Camera: Arjun Tiwari & Team  
▶️ Production Manager : Deepen Gautam (Mical ) 
▶️ Director: Gaurav Giri  
▶️ Poster Design: Shann Thapa 

Lyrics ----
सिरिमा सिरि बतास चल्दा
सल्ला घारी सुसायो 
हो, तिरिमा तिरी मुरली बज्दा
मन मेरो रसायो ।

मेरो यो मनले रोजेको मान्छे तिमी,
मेरो यो मनले रोजेको मान्छे तिमी 
दिलमा सजाउँला,
मेरो दिलको रानी बनाउँला,
मेरो दिलको राजा बनाउँला।

रानी बनाउँला, दिलमा सजाउँला,
राजा बनाउँला, दिलमा सजाउँला।
मेरो यो मनले रोजेको मान्छे तिमी
दिलमा सजाउँला।

मेरो दिलको राजा बनाउँला,
मेरो दिलको रानी बनाउँला।

लजालु तिम्रो मुस्कान , हेर मनमा राखौंला,
सुख–दुःख तिमी र म ,सँगसँगै बाँडौंला।

मेरो यो मनले रोजेको मान्छे तिमी,
मेरो यो मनले रोजेको मान्छे तिमी 
दिलमा सजाउँला,
मेरो दिलको रानी बनाउँला,
मेरो दिलको राजा बनाउँला।

दुलही बनी स्वयंवरको माला लगाउँला,
नौमती बाजा बजाई , जन्ती लिएर आउँला।

मेरो यो मनले रोजेको मान्छे तिमी,
मेरो यो मनले रोजेको मान्छे तिमी 
दिलमा सजाउँला,
मेरो दिलको राजा बनाउँला,
मेरो दिलको रानी बनाउँला।

राजा बनाउँला, दिलमा सजाउँला,
रानी बनाउँला, दिलमा सजाउँला।
मेरो यो मनले रोजेको मान्छे तिमी
दिलमा सजाउँला।

मेरो दिलको रानी बनाउँला,
मेरो दिलको राजा बनाउँला। 

Sirima siri batas chalda
Salla ghari susaayo
Ho, tirima tiri murali bajda
Man mero rasaayo .

Mero yo manle rojheko manche timi,
Mero yo manle rojheko manche timi
Dilma sajaula,
Mero dilko rani banaula,
Mero dilko raja banaula.

Rani banaula, dilma sajaula,
Raja banaula, dilma sajaula.
Mero yo manle rojheko manche timi
Dilma sajaula.

Mero dilko raja banaula,
Mero dilko rani banaula.

Lajalu timro muskan hera
Manma rakhaula,
Sukh–dukh timi ra ma
Sangsangai bandaula.

Mero yo manle rojheko manche timi,
Mero yo manle rojheko manche timi
Dilma sajaula,
Mero dilko rani banaula,
Mero dilko raja banaula.

Dulahi bani swayamwarko
Mala lagaula,
Naumati baja bajai
Janti liyera aula.

Mero yo manle rojheko manche timi,
Mero yo manle rojheko manche timi
Dilma sajaula,
Mero dilko raja banaula,
Mero dilko rani banaula.

Raja banaula, dilma sajaula,
Rani banaula, dilma sajaula.
Mero yo manle rojheko manche timi
Dilma sajaula.

Mero dilko rani banaula,
Mero dilko raja banaula. 

© All rights reserved by Suman KC.
Contact 📞 9851121548

Unauthorized downloading, re-uploading, or duplication of this video on any platform is strictly prohibited and may result in copyright claim or strike.

Listen, Share & Subscribe for more official songs.

Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer on @MythriMovieMakers 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming 2026 Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar with Director Priyadarshan is set for Bhooth Bangla Franchise with Tabu & Wamiqa Gabbi in Mysterious Roles of Horror Comedy & Suspense- Bhooth Bangla Teaser is pure Nostalgia of Bhool Bhulaiyaa but falls short in editing & establishing connection of Old Characters in new story. Bhooth Bangla Teaser Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar challenge Kartik Aaryan for OG Horror Comedy Franchise? Do leave Comments below now!

#BhoothBangla #BhoothBanglaTeaser #BhoothBanglaTeaserReview

snippet.title: Bairan – Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
That’s why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari 

Spotify:-

https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ?si=XhB3Yr_DSdiQjMaq7OSobw

Apple Music:-

https://music.apple.com/in/song/bairan/1868495536

Lyrics:-

मनै सांभ-सांभ राखे
तेरे झांझरा के जोड़े
मेरी गेल रो-रो ये भी
छोरी बावले से होरे

मन्ने आये जावे ख्याल तेरे
खाये जावे ख्याल तेरे
जीण कोन्या देती 
हाय...
बैरी तन्हाई मनै 

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

हो... 
मारया - मारया फिरै
देख हाल तू बिचारे का
तेरे बिना जीणा भी
के जीणा बंजारे का

खोया रहूँ याद तेरी
कर क नादानियां
बटुवे में राखूँ तेरी
सांभ के निशानियां

तेरे बिना काल होरया
ठीक कोन्या हाल मेरा
हाथ जोड़ूँ राम देदे
सांसा ते रिहाई मनै

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई रै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई रै

ज तू थोड़ी घबरा ज्या
मेरी याद तन्नै आ ज्या
तू दे दिये आवाज रै मैं
आ जाऊँगा

तोडूँ दुनिया की रीत
रै के हार रै के जीत
मनै चहिये तेरी प्रीत
मैं निभा जाऊँगा

देख बावला बणा गी
मन्ने लिखना सिखा गी
हाय... नोच-नोच खागी
तेरी बैरण जुदाई मनै

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई रै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई रै

आज तांई निभाऊँ जो सी
कसम थी खाई मनै
ज़िंदगी सारी या मेरी
तेरे लेखे लाई मनै


#bairan #banjaare #haryanvisadsongs #haryanviindie #banjaaremusic

सांभ के निशानियां

तेरे बिना काल होरया
ठीक कोन्या हाल मेरा
हाथ जोड़ूँ राम देदे
सांसा ते रिहाई मनै

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई रै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई रै

ज तू थोड़ी घबरा ज्या
मेरी याद तन्नै आ ज्या
तू दे दिये आवाज रै मैं
आ जाऊँगा

तोडूँ दुनिया की रीत
रै के हार रै के जीत
मनै चहिये तेरी प्रीत
मैं निभा जाऊँगा

देख बावला बणा गी
मन्ने लिखना सिखा गी
हाय... नोच-नोच खागी
तेरी बैरण जुदाई मनै

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई रै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई रै

आज तांई निभाऊँ जो सी
कसम थी खाई मनै
ज़िंदगी सारी या मेरी
तेरे लेखे लाई मनै

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke…
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith ke…. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke …. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath ke…
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Farkera Aauchhau Ki ( फर्केर आउँछौ कि ) || Ft. Gokarna Shrestha, Sumitra Tamang || Manish Limbu
snippet.description:
Farkera Aauchhau Ki ( फर्केर आउँछौ कि ) || Ft. Gokarna Shrestha, Sumitra Tamang || Manish Limbu

🎵 Audio Credit 🎵
Lyrics/Music : Gokarna Shrestha
Vocal : Manish Limbu
Arrange : Sagar Sansar Rai
Mixed/Mastered : Sajan Shah
Flute : Ratna BK
Guitar : Sanjeev Baraili
Sarangi : Manish Gandarva
Recording  : Mahol Studio

🎬 Video Credit 🎬
Cast :     Gokarna Shrestha
               Sumitra Tamang

Guest Cast : Zimbey Rai
                       Rajendra Khadgi
                       Anjana Barailli

Story/Concept : Gokarna Shrestha
Direction: Suman Basnet 
Camera: Sanam Tamang & Team
Edit/Color : Bikash Dahal
Makeup Artist : Aakriti Khadka
Production Manager : Surya oli
Technial Head : Harka Pahari & Team
                       

Special Thanks :
                             Biswa Limbu ( Mero Online TV )
                             Kehar Sing Limbu
                             Binod Tamang 
                             Sujan Bhurtel
                             Nirajan Thapa
                             Diraj Limbu
                             Ramesh Regmi
                             Arjun Katuwal
                             Arjun Khadka
                             Ramesh Shrestha
                             Prince Leo
                             Milan Khadka
                             Aditya Thakuri
                             Neyushan Shrestha
                             Shivraj Dangi
                             Saugat Gautam
                             Dinesh Kathyat
                             Krish Kc
                             Ramesh Rai
                             Samir M. Tamang

                            Standard Khabar Media PVT. LTD
                                   Dami Khabar PVT.LTD
                                   Biswa Limbu Podcast
                                   Brothers Rental
                                   Hotel Chisopani
                           All My Facebook & Tiktok family

Song Lyrisc :
टाढा गयौ तिमी, मलाई छोडेर
 खाएका बाचा अनि, विश्वासलाई तोडेर
बिन्ती गर्छु तिमीलाई, दुई हात जोडेर
 फर्की आइदेउ प्रिय, बाटो मोडेर 

टाढै भएपनि, मनको माया मर्दैन
 अन्तै खुसी छौ भने, फर्की आउनु पर्दैन। 

नफर्किनेगरी गयौ, मैले चाहेरनि रोक्न सकिन,
 आँसुले कोरेको शब्दमा, तिमी नै तिमी छौ किन?

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

तिम्रो तस्बिर हेर्दै, रातभरि बोल्छु।
 कल्पनामै भएपनि, मनको कुरा खोल्छु।
 सम्झन्छु ती दिनहरू,जब साथमा तिमी थियौ
 माया माग्दा बदलामा, किन धोका दियौ 

 थाहा छ तिमी अब, फर्केर आउँदैन
 मैले जति आँसु बगाएनि, तिमीलाई पाउँदैन। 

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

खुसी हुनु जोसँग छौ, तिम्रो बाटो छेक्दिन
टाढै जानु मदेखि ,अब तिमीलाई रोक्दिन
 बिर्सिएरै जाउ मलाई, सम्झनामा नआओस्
मैले पाएजस्तो धोका, तिमीले नपाओस् 

 अर्को जन्म हुन्छ भने, भेट्नु छैन तिमीलाई,
 बदला लिन आफ्नै मुटु, रेट्नु छैन तिमीलाई
फाटेको मन अब, यादको सियोले सिउँदछु।
यो जुनी त केवल, तिम्रै नाममा जिउँदछु। 

बाँच्नु छैन अब मलाई मुटु दुखाएर
गाह्रो भो हाँस्न अब आँसु लुकाएर

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

Tadha gayau timi, malai chhoder
Khayeka bacha ani, bishwaslai toder
Binti garchhu timilai, dui haat joder
Farki aideu priya, bato moder

Tadhai bhaepani, manko maya mardaina
Antai khusi chhau bhane, Farki aaunu pardaina

Nafarkine gari gayau, maile chahera ni rokna sakin
Aansule koreko shabdama, timi nai timi chhau kina?

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

Timro tasbir herdai, raatbhari bolchhu
Kalpanamai bhaepani, manko kura kholchhu
Samjhinchhu ti dinharu, jaba saathma timi thiyau
Maya magda badlama, kina dhoka diyau

Thaha chha timi aba, Farkera aaudaina
Maile jati aansu bagaeni, timilai paaudaina

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

Khusi hunu josanga chhau, timro bato chhekdina
Tadhai janu madekhi, aba timilai rokdina
Birsiera jau malai, samjhanama naaos
Maile paae jasto dhoka, timile napaos

Arko janma hunchha bhane, bhetna chhaina timilai
Badla lina aafnai mutu, retnu chhaina timilai
Fateko man aba, yaadko siyole siundchhu
Yo juni ta kebal, timrai naam ma jiundchhu

Bachnu chhaina aba malai mutu dukhaayera
Gahro bho haasna aba aansu lukaayera

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better

(Lyrics)
[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burnin' through the hours talkin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is, but I got that feelin'
Wakin' up in this bed next to you, swear the room, yeah, it got no ceilin'
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talkin'
I might have to tell you somethin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Lay here with me, ayy, ayy, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (Yes, I do, yes, I do, baby)
I like me better when I'm with you (Oh no)
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh no)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Stay awhile stay awhile stay here with me
Lay here with me ayy ayy ooh
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better
When I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I am with you
I Like Me Better

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

Music Provided by https://www.extrememusic.com
----------------------------------------------------------------
follow all of these or i will kick you
• Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/MrBeast/
• Twitter - https://twitter.com/MrBeast
•  Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/mrbeast
--------------------------------------------------------------------

en.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
en.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

snippet.title: Sarke Chunar Teri Sarke Hindi Song | KD | Nora Fatehi | Sanjay Dutt | Dhruva Sarja | Prems, AJ, KVN
snippet.description:
Presenting The Sarke Chunar Teri Sarke Lyrical Song From The Movie KD-The Devil Starring: Dhruva Sarja, Reeshma Nanaiah, Shilpa Shetty & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 
----------------------------------------------
#KD #KDTHEDEVIL #sarkechunarterisarke #norafatehi #sanjaydutt #mangli #KVNProductions #sanjubaba #jogiprem #rajusundaram  #hindinewsong  #kdmoviesong #reeshmananaiah #shivashiva #dhruvasarja #trending #prems #raqeeb #newsong #hindisong #jogiprem #kdthirdsingle #kdsong #arjunjanya #shilpashetty #ramesharavind #hindi #shivashiva #vravichandran #showmanprem #youtube #anandaudio 
--------------------------------
 Lyrics:
Hey..are sar..sar..sar..sar..sar se chundri sarke 
Hey..dhak..dhak..dhak..dhak dil ye mera dhadke 
Hallu se tu tham le 
Ye pallu mera..tera naam le

Sarke Sarke..Chunar Teri Sarke 
Sarke Sarke..Chunar Teri Sarke
...............Khalnayak Hoon Main 

F: Pahle Uthale, Ander Wo Dale 
Neeche Ek Boond Na Girae 
Khali Kar Ke Nikale 
Mujh Pe Na Girana Mujhe Lagta Hai Dar 
Bhed Khul Jaae Na Sambhal Ke Jaana Ghar 
Choosega ya chatega, jo karega kar 
Teri Bottle Pe Na Pade Kisi Ki Bhi Nazar

Sarke Sarke..Chunar Teri Sarke 
Sarke Sarke..Chunar Teri Sarke
...............Khalnayak Hoon Main 

F: O Muchhon Wale Itna Bata De 
Ghar Main Jawan Gharwali Kyun Chahe Bahar Wali.. 
Mahngi Hun Main Thodi 
Par Aungi Na Ghabra 
Khush Ho Jae to Phir 
Mujhe Lahnga Dila 
Dekhne Men Hun Naram 
Chhune Le To Garam 
Chatpati Main Yaar, Jaise Aam Ka Achaar 

Sarke Sarke..Chunar Teri Sarke 
Sarke Sarke..Chunar Teri Sarke
................Khalnayak Hoon Main 

-----------------
Music Credits
Song Name : Sarke Chunar Teri Sarke  
Singer : Mangli
Lyrics : Raqeeb Alam
Music : Arjun Janya

Song composed, arranged and produced by Arjun Janya

•Keyboard programming : Venkatesan Venkat Periyanayagam 
•Rhythm programming :
Ricky D Costa 
Andruson Andru
•Flute : Naveen Kumar 
•Guitar, solo violin, ethnic strings and plucked strings : Amalraj 
•Live rhythms : Taufiq Qureshi and team
•Choir : EL FÉ Choir by Roe Vincent
•Orchestra : 
Additional Orchestral Arrangements: Sanjay R.A 
Strings, Brass, Woodwinds, Choir Performed and Recorded by Budapest Scoring Orchestra 
Recorded at : Rottenbiller UTCA 47 
Conducted by : Peter Illenyi 
Recorded by Denes Redley, Viktor Szabo
Orchestra Indian Representative: Balasubramanian G
Session Producer : Balint Sapszon 
Orchestrators : Sanjay R.A Abhishek Viswanathan, Balasubramanian G
Studio Assistant : Patrik Vereb 
Librarian : Agnes, Kati Reti
•Mixed and Mastered by Eric Pillai at Future Sounds of Bombay
•Song produced at Om Shakthi Studio, Bengaluru 
•Studio Enginner : Nishan Rai
Lyrical Video Team : Walls And Trends (Hyderabad)
DI Studio : Color 51

snippet.title: TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. itsriken
snippet.description:
TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. Itsriken 
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯
“TIMRO LOOKS” is a rap song with a flirty mood, talking about that one girl whose looks and vibe keep running through my mind♪

Official Audio - https://youtu.be/hMIDW5HUY08?si=OMalmwP6kpg-L5n5

lyrics...

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER 
                     X2

Rinmorin - Verse 
HEJO SAAMA MALAI BAAL THYNA 
KASAI KO YHA JABA TIMLAI DEKHY MERO 
MUKH BATA DAMM GRIL 

LUKI LUKI HERNY BANI LAGYO TIMI LAI 
MA NAJIKINA KHOJE TARA KADA UMRYO JHYAN VAARRR

HALKA GARIDAUNA BATH 
ABO CHAIYO TIMRO SAATH DIYE 
CHODINA YO HAAT JHUTO  BOLE 
VANY MARI JAAUU

MUTU VETRA JAMMA 4 WOTA THAU 
HUNXA 
2 THAUMA TIMI RA MAH  2 THAUMA 
AAMA BAAU

RAKHI SAKE TIMLAI AARU VANDA MATHI 
AAKHA LAUNY TORI HARKO HAAT KHUTAA
VAACHDINXU MAAA

AARU VANDA NIKAI FARK XU MAH BAAL SANGAI  BUDHI ANI BAAG JASTI AATI XU MAAH 
TIMI 
XAUMA HUDA KAILY AATIN XA MAANN
JHUTO BOLYA HOINA  NASALU CHJJJ KHADINA MA
JALMA
 PARISAKE KEBAL HAAT DINUU LAAAA
ABO BAKI KURA PANDIT LAI RAKHDINXU MA TIMRO 

 LACHKINY KAAMR KO 36 KO number 
NA LAJAUNA VANNA LAI BADDHAI CHA 
HUNGER MA JAPDAI  XU MANTAR YHA DHERI XA ANTAR 
TIMRO JAWANI DEKHE RA LAAGDAI CHA 
CHAKKR

MA MAYA KO ROGI 
TIMI BANDAUNA 
DOCTOR AHH
 MAYA KO LAGI KATI 
KHADAI CHU THAKKR

HALKA BADY KO JEEUDAL 
MAH  MAKHHA TIMI SIMPLE NAI 
RAMRI NA PARANA NAKAL 

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER
                  X2

KBABI - verse 
NAHANA KTA GUFF MATHI GUFF 
DHERAI AATE GAYE TIMI JASTO CHAKS
RAYAAK LAGI RACHA PACHI PACHI
NAPARANA HASSss…..

Rinmorin - YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN !!!

FASDINA MAH JHAL MAH
NAGARANA AASH 
JAY HO TYI VANDINXU MALAI LAGDAINA K LAAJ
MALAI MAAN PARDAINA BOKA HARU 
VANU PARDA KHASS
SAMALYRA RAKHA TIMRO JAWANI KO MAAT

K VAKO KTA HARU KT DEKHI MARNY
JHYAP CHA SIDE MAH CHICKS KO PAXI PARNY KT DEKHNAI HUNNA 
MASKY RA KURA GARNY 
K BOLIDI HALYO VANY FERI
MASKI NAJIK SARNY 

GARO GARO VAKO HOLA 
JAWANI DEKHYRA
CHITTA BUJAU ABO KTA 
TADHAI BATA HERYRA
TIMI JASTO GAFADI YHA KTA HARU
DHERAI CHA THMANAI NASAKNY TESTO KURA MA MAH K RAICHA 

Rinmorin - OH shit !!

KBABI - MAYA KO ROGI VAYE JAAU GARAU CHECK UP 
TIMRO POCKET MONEY LAY AAUDAINA MERO MAKE-UP
SOCHDAI SOCHDINA MA MERO MIND PURAI SETUP 
KBABI TESTO KTA GARDAINA NI DESERVE 

PATAUNA KHOJYA HOLA
PATINY MAH CHAINA
GUFADI KO TRUST UMMM HMM
TESTO KT HOINA
KTA HARKO BANI SABI YESTI TA HO NI 
AAFNO KAAM GARA PACHI NALAGANA
SORRY BRO….

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER  
                  X2 


🎵 Listen on All Platforms:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/1X8s9oJ5GfTy1fU3jGyFkZ?si=3w_4k112TnWm1i8Ul_33CA
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/np/artist/rinmorin-official/1762874620?ls
Anghami: https://open.anghami.com/6q83wE5K2Tb

📲 Follow Rinmorin:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rinmorin_official
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/rinmorin.tmg
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@rinmorin
YouTube: https://youtube.com/@Rinmorin
Kbabi Tiktok : https://www.tiktok.com/@kbabi124

KBABI - https://youtube.com/@kbabi-q3b

🎙️ Credits:
Artist: Rinmorin & KBABI 
Producer: Itsriken 
Lyrics & Vocals: Rinmorin & KBABI 
D.O.P - Rinmorin 
Featured Artist - KBABI 
Mix/Master: Rinmorin

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

bn.title: মাইনক্রাফ্ট  স্পিডরানার ভার্সেস ৬ জন হান্টার
bn.description:
মাইনক্রাফ্ট  স্পিডরানার ভার্সেস ৬ জন হান্টার। তোমরা এটা চেয়েছিলে। সিরিজের পুনরজীবন। একটা অত্যন্ত চমৎকার ছিল।

আমার সোশ্যালগুলি ফলো করো:
➽ টুইটার - @unknown-role
➽ ইনস্টাগ্রাম - @unknown-rolewastaken
➽ স্ন্যাপচ্যাট- @unknown-rolepublic

পণ্যসামগ্রী: https://dream.shop/

ব্যাডবইহেলো:  @thesaintsofgames
জর্জ:  @GeorgeNotFound
স্যাপন্যাপ:  @Sapnap
অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট:  @Antfrost
অসমডুড:  @awesamdude
ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি:  @CaptainPuffy

আমরা এই সিরিজকে মাইনক্রাফ্ট ম্যানহান্ট বলার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি । এই  ভিডিওটি কারি আরেক রূপ, যেখানে ৬ জন হান্টার আছে চীন অথবা একজনের বদলে।
এটি একটি নতুন Minecraft 1.21.11 চ্যালেঞ্জ যা আমরা চেষ্টা করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি। আমি গেমটি জেতার চেষ্টা করি, আর আমার বন্ধু জর্জ, স্যাপন্যাপ, ব্যাডবয়হেলো, অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট, অসমডুড এবং ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি আমাকে বাধা দেওয়ার চেষ্টা করে। এটি মূলত একটি দৌড় প্রতিযোগিতা, এটি অত্যন্ত উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ ছিল এবং আমরা প্রচুর মজা করেছি। আমি এই ধরনের চ্যালেঞ্জগুলো করতে খুব পছন্দ করি।
যদি এই ভিডিওতে ৫০০,০০০ লাইক পড়ে, তবে আমরা আবার এর একটি ফিরতি ম্যাচ  খেলব!
এটি "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু জল বাড়ছে" বা "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু লাভা বাড়ছে"—এই ধরণের কোনো চ্যালেঞ্জ নয়। এটি একজন খুনি বা আততায়ীর বিরুদ্ধে মাইনক্রাফটের একজন স্পিডরানার-এর টিকে থাকার লড়াই।

hi.title: माइनक्राफ्ट स्पीडरनर VS 6 हंटर
hi.description:
माइनक्राफ्ट स्पीडरनर VS 6 हंटर। आपने इसकी मांग की थी। सीरीज़ का अगला भाग। यह बिल्कुल पागलपन भरा था।

मेरे सोशल मीडिया को follow करें:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dream

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames  
George:  @GeorgeNotFound  
Sapnap:  @Sapnap  
Antfrost:  @Antfrost  
awesamdude:  @awesamdude  
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy  

हमने इसे “Minecraft Manhunt” सीरीज़ कहने का तय किया था। यह वीडियो इसका एक अलग संस्करण है, जहाँ 6 हंटर्स हैं, तीन शिकारी या सिर्फ़ एक के बजाय।

यह एक नया Minecraft 'But' है और 1.21.11 की चुनौती है, जिसे हमने आज़माने का फ़ैसला किया था। मैं गेम को पूरा करने की कोशिश करता हूँ, जबकि मेरा दोस्त George और मेरा दोस्त Sapnap और मेरा दोस्त BadBoyHalo और मेरा दोस्त Antfrost और मेरा दोस्त Awesamdude और मेरी दोस्त Captain Puffy मुझे रोकने की कोशिश करते हैं। यह एक बहुत ही तीव्र रेस है, जिसमें हमें बहुत मज़ा आया था। मुझे ऐसे चैलेंज करना बहुत पसंद है।

अगर इस वीडियो को 500,000 लाइक्स मिलते हैं तो हम रीमैच करेंगे!

यह ‘Minecraft, But Water Rises’ या ‘Minecraft, But Lava Rises’ जैसे किसी भी ‘But’ चैलेंज जैसा नहीं है। यह स्पीडरन है / जिसमें एक स्पीडरनर का मुकाबला एक किलर / असैसिन से होता है।

#MinecraftManhunt

cs.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Lovců. Řekli jste si o to. Pokračování série. Tohle bylo naprosto šílené. 

Sledujte me sociální sítě: 
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Rozhodli jsme se tuto sérii nazvat Minecraft Manhunt. Tohle video je jiné provedení, kde je ŠEST lovců místo TŘÍ lovců nebo jen jednoho. 

Tohle je nová “Minecraft, ale…” challenge v 1.21.11, kterou jsme se rozhodli vyzkoušet. Snažím se vyhrát, zatímco se mi to můj kamarád George A můj kamarád Sapnap A můj kamarád BadBoyHalo A můj kamarád Antfrost A můj kamarád awesamdude A moje kamarádka CaptainPuffy snaží překazit. Je to super intenzivní závod, během kterého jsme se hodně nasmáli. Zbožňuju tyto výzvy. 

Když tohle video získá 500 000 liků, tak uděláme rematch! 

Ne “Minecraft, ale zvedá se hladina vody” nebo “Minecraft, ale zvedá se hladina lávy”, ani žádná podobná challenge. Tohle je Minecraft speedrun / speedrunner proti zabijákovi / vrahovi 

#MinecraftManhunt

ta.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
ta.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. நீங்கள் அதைக் கேட்டீர்கள். தொடரின் தொடர்ச்சி. இது முற்றிலும் பைத்தியக்காரத்தனமாக இருந்தது.

எனது சமூக ஊடகங்களைப் பின்தொடரவும்:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

இந்தத் தொடரை Minecraft Manhunt என்று அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் வித்தியாசமான பதிப்பாகும், அங்கு மூன்று வேட்டைக்காரர்களுக்குப் பதிலாக ஆறு வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் அல்லது ஒருவர் மட்டுமே உள்ளனர்.

இது ஒரு புதிய Minecraft ஆனால், 1.21.11 சவாலை நாங்கள் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்துள்ளோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், அதே நேரத்தில் என் நண்பர் ஜார்ஜ் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் சப்னாப் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் பேட்பாய்ஹாலோ மற்றும் என் நண்பர் ஆண்ட்ஃப்ரோஸ்ட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் அவெசம்டுட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் கேப்டன் பஃபி நான் அதைச் செய்வதைத் தடுக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், இது மிகவும் தீவிரமானது, எங்களுக்கு நிறைய சிரிப்புகள் இருந்தன. இந்த சவால்களைச் செய்வது எனக்கு மிகவும் பிடிக்கும்.

இந்த வீடியோ 500,000 லைக்குகளைப் பெற்றால், நாங்கள் மீண்டும் ஒரு போட்டியை நடத்துவோம்!

மைன்கிராஃப்ட் அல்ல, ஆனால் வாட்டர் ரைசஸ் அல்லது மைன்கிராஃப்ட், ஆனால் லாவா ரைசஸ், அல்லது வேறு ஏதேனும் ஆனால் அது போன்ற சவால். இது ஒரு கொலையாளி / கொலையாளிக்கு எதிரான மைன்கிராஃப்டின் வேக ஓட்டம் / வேக ஓட்டப்பந்தய வீரர்.

uk.title: Майнкрафт Спідранер Проти 6 Мисливців
uk.description:
Майнкрафт Спідранер Проти 6 Мисливців Ви просили. Це продовження серій. Це було абсолютне божевілля.

Слідкуйте за моїми соціальними мережами
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Мерч: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Ми вирішили назвати ці серії Майнкрафт Менхантом. Це відео це інша інтерпретація, де є ШІСТЬ мисливців замість ТРЬОХ або лише одного. 

Це новий Майнкрафт, але 1.21.11 виклик що ми вирішили спробувати. Я намагаюсь пройти гру, поки мій друг Джордж і мій друг Сепнеп і мій друг БедБойХало і мій друг Антфрост і мій друг Авсемдуд і моя подруга КапітанПаффі намагаються не дати мені цього зробити. Це перегони і вони дуже інтенсивні і ми мали над чим посміятись. Люблю займатись цими викликами. 

Якщо це відео набере 500,000 лайків ми повторимо матч!

Не Майнкрафт, Але Вода Підіймається або Майнкрафт, Але Лава Підіймається, або будь-який подібний виклик. Це швидкісне проходження / спідранер Майкрафту проти кіллера / вбивці

ar.title: سبيدرنر ماينكرافت ضد 6 صيادين
ar.description:
سبيدرنر ماينكرافت ضد 6 صيادين

تابعوني على مواقع الواصل الإجتماعي:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

سلعي: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

قررنا تسمية هذه السلسلة ماين كرافت مانهانت. هذا الفيديو نسخة مختلفة عنها، حيث يوجد ستة صيادين بدلاً من ثلاثة أو واحد.

هذا تحدي جديد من "ماين كرافت لكن"  قرّرنا تجربته، بإصدار 1.21.11. أحاول إنهاء اللعبة، بينما يحاول أصدقائي جورج وسابناب و badboyhalo و Antfrost و Awesamdude وكابتن بافي منعي من القيام بذلك.  إنّه سباق ، وهو حماسي جدّاً وقد قضينا وقتاً ممتعاً للغاية. أحب القيام بهذه التحديات.

إذا حصل هذا الفيديو على 500,000 إعجاب سنقوم بإعادة للتحدي

ليس تحدي "ماين كرافت: لكن الماء يرتفع" أو "ماين كرافت: لكن الحمم ترتفع"، أو أي تحدي مشابه لذلك. هذا تحدي سبيدرن في ماين كرافت ضد قاتل.
#MinecraftManhunt

de.title: Minecraft Speedrunner gegen 6 Jäger
de.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner gegen 6 Jäger. Ihr wolltet es. Die Fortsetzung der Serie. Das war absoluter Wahnsinn.

Folge mir auf Social Media:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merchandise: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Wir haben diese Serie "Minecraft Manhunt" genannt. Dieses Video ist eine etwas andere Version davon: Es gibt SECHS Jäger anstelle von nur DREI Jägern oder nur einem.

Das ist eine neue "Minecraft, aber" Herausforderung, in Version 1.21.11, die wir ausprobieren. Ich versuche, das Spiel zu besiegen, während mein Freund George UND mein Freund Sapnap UND mein Freund BadBoyHalo UND mein Freund Antfrost UND mein Freund Awesamdude UND meine Freundin CpatainPuffy versuchen, mich daran zu hindern. Es ist ein Wettlauf, super spannend und wir haben jede Menge gelacht. Ich liebe diese Herausforderungen.

Wenn dieses Video 500.000 Likes bekommt, wird es ein Rematch geben!

Nicht etwa "Minecraft, aber Wasser steigt" oder "Minecraft, aber Lava steigt" oder irgendeine ähnliche "aber" Herausforderung. Dies ist ein Speedrun / Minecraft Speedrunner gegen einen Killer/Assassinen.

#MinecraftManhunt

zh.title: 我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人
zh.description:
我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人，你们一直在催的内容来了——这个系列的续作！这一次的对决简直疯狂到离谱。

关注我的社交平台：
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

周边商品：
https://dream.shop/

参与者：
BadBoyHalo @thesaintsofgames
George @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap @Sapnap
Antfrost @Antfrost
awesamdude @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy @CaptainPuffy

我们把这个系列称为 Minecraft Manhunt（我的世界猎人游戏）。不过这一次的版本和以往不同——不是三名猎人，也不是一名猎人，而是整整六名猎人！

这是一次基于 Minecraft 1.21.11 的全新挑战：
我的目标是通关游戏，而我的朋友 George、Sapnap、BadBoyHalo、Antfrost、awesamdude 和 CaptainPuffy 的唯一任务，就是不惜一切代价阻止我。这是一场竞速对决，节奏紧张到爆，全程高能，我们也笑个不停。我真的很喜欢做这种挑战。

如果这个视频达到 50 万点赞，我们就来一场复赛！

这不是"Minecraft，但水位上升"或"Minecraft，但岩浆上升"那类“MC但是...挑战”。这是 Minecraft 速通者 vs 猎人/刺客 的极限对抗。

#MinecraftManhunt

en.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
en.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

bg.title: Minecraft Спийдрънър СРЕЩУ 6-ма Ловци
bg.description:
Minecraft Спийдрънър СРЕЩУ 6-ма Ловци. Вие го поискахте. Продължението на поредицата. Това беше абсолютно лудост.

​Последвайте ме в социалните мрежи:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic
​Мърч: https://dream.shop/

​BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

​Решихме да наречем тази поредица Minecraft Manhunt. Това видео е различен вариант, в който има ШЕСТИМА преследвачи вместо ТРИМА или само един.
​Това е ново „Minecraft, но...“ 1.21.11 предизвикателство, което решихме да изпробваме. Опитвам се да превъртя играта, докато моите приятели George И Sapnap И BadBoyHalo И Antfrost И awesamdude И CaptainPuffy се опитват да ми попречат. Това е състезание, беше супер напрегнато и много се забавлявахме. Обичам да правя тези предизвикателства.

​Ако това видео събере 500 000 харесвания, ще направим реванш!

​Това не е „Minecraft, но водата се покачва“ или „Minecraft, но лавата се покачва“, или което и да е друго подобно предизвикателство. Това е спийдрън / спийдрънър на Minecraft срещу убиец/асасин.

​#MinecraftManhunt

hi.description:
हे भगवान! ब्लॉक्स फ्रूट्स के मालिक ने मेरे सर्वर को श्राप दिया + ये सब हुआ..! ☠️

+ माफ़ करना, मैंने 9 दिनों से वीडियो पोस्ट नहीं किया, असल ज़िंदगी में काम में बहुत व्यस्त थी + मैंने थोड़ा ब्रेक भी लिया था xD लेकिन अब मैं वापस आ गई हूँ + आज जो भी क्लिप आप देख रहे हैं वो पहले दिन की हैं xD ज़्यादा नहीं खेली + कुछ क्लिप मैं यहाँ पोस्ट नहीं कर सकती क्योंकि उनमें कॉपीराइट वाला गाना है

bn.title: ওহ! ব্লক্স ফ্রুটসের মালিক আমার সার্ভারকে অভিশাপ দিয়েছেন + এটা ঘটেছে..! ☠️

+ দুঃখিত, বাস্তব জীবনের কাজে ব্যস্ত থাকার কারণে ৯ দিন ধরে ভিডিও পোস্ট করিনি + আমিও একটু বিরতি নিয়েছিলাম xD কিন্তু এখন ফিরে এসেছি + আজ যা দেখছো সব ক্লিপ প্রথম দিনের ক্লিপ xD খুব বেশি চালানো হয়নি + কিছু ক্লিপ আমি এখানে পোস্ট করতে পারছি না কারণ সেখানে কপিরাইট গান আছে

ar.title: يا إلهي! مالك لعبة Blox Fruits شتم خادمي + حدث هذا..! ☠️
ar.description:
يا إلهي! مالك لعبة Blox Fruits شتم خادمي! وهذا ما حدث! ☠️

+ آسف لعدم نشر أي فيديو لمدة 9 أيام، كنت مشغولاً جداً بعملي، وأخذت استراحة قصيرة أيضاً xD لكنني عدت الآن. + جميع المقاطع التي ترونها اليوم هي من اليوم الأول xD لم ألعبها كثيراً. + بعض المقاطع لا يمكنني نشرها هنا لأنها تحتوي على موسيقى محمية بحقوق الطبع والنشر.

#bloxfruits #roblox

uk.title: О, БОЖЕ! Власник Blox Fruits ПРОКЛЯВ МІЙ СЕРВЕР + ЦЕ СТАЛОСЯ..! ☠️
uk.description:
О БОЖЕ! Власник Blox Fruits ПРОКЛЯВ МІЙ СЕРВЕР + ЦЕ СТАЛОСЯ..! ☠️

+ вибачте, що не публікував відео 9 днів, надто зайнятий на роботі в реальному житті + я також взяв невелику перерву xD, але тепер я повернувся + всі кліпи, які ви бачите сьогодні, це з першого дня xD не дуже багато переглядав + деякі кліпи я не можу опублікувати тут, бо там є пісня, захищена авторським правом

#bloxfruits #roblox

fr-FR.title: Oh mon Dieu ! Le propriétaire de Blox Fruits a maudit mon serveur et voilà ce qui s'est passé… ! ☠️
fr-FR.description:
Oh mon Dieu ! Le propriétaire de Blox Fruits a jeté un sort sur mon serveur ! Et voilà ce qui s'est passé… ! ☠️

Désolée pour mon absence de 9 jours, j'étais très occupée par mon travail. J'ai aussi fait une petite pause xD Mais me revoilà ! Toutes les séquences que vous voyez aujourd'hui datent du premier jour xD Je n'ai pas beaucoup joué. Certaines séquences sont interdites car elles contiennent des musiques protégées par des droits d'auteur.

#bloxfruits #roblox

pt-BR.title: Meu Deus! O dono do Blox Fruits amaldiçoou meu servidor e isso aconteceu! ☠️
pt-BR.description:
MEU DEUS! O dono do Blox Fruits amaldiçoou meu servidor! + ISSO ACONTECEU..! ☠️

+ Desculpem por não ter postado vídeo por 9 dias, estou muito ocupado com o trabalho na vida real + também tirei um tempinho de folga xD mas agora estou de volta + todos os vídeos que vocês veem hoje são do primeiro dia xD não joguei muito + alguns vídeos eu não posso postar aqui porque têm músicas com direitos autorais

#bloxfruits #roblox

ru.title: О боже! Владелец Blox Fruits проклял мой сервер, и вот что произошло..! ☠️
ru.description:
О боже! Владелец Blox Fruits проклял мой сервер! + Вот что случилось..! ☠️

+ Извините, что не выкладывала видео 9 дней, была слишком занята на работе + я также немного отдохнула xD, но теперь я вернулась + Все клипы, которые вы видите сегодня, взяты из первого дня xD Я мало играла + Некоторые клипы я не могу выложить здесь, потому что в них есть защищенная авторским правом музыка.

#bloxfruits #roblox

it.title: OMG! Il proprietario di Blox Fruits ha maledetto il mio server + è successo questo..! ☠️
it.description:
Oddio! Il proprietario di Blox Fruits ha maledetto il mio server! E poi è successo questo! ☠️

Scusate se non ho pubblicato video per 9 giorni, ero troppo impegnato con il lavoro nella vita reale. Mi sono anche preso una piccola pausa xD ma ora sono tornato. Tutte le clip che vedete oggi sono del primo giorno xD non ho giocato molto. Alcune clip non posso pubblicarle qui perché contengono musica protetta da copyright.

#bloxfruits #roblox

es-US.title: ¡Dios mío! ¡El dueño de Blox Fruits maldijo mi servidor y pasó esto! ☠️
es-US.description:
¡Dios mío! ¡El dueño de Blox Fruits maldijo mi servidor! ¡Y pasó esto! ☠️

+ Perdón por no haber subido videos en 9 días, estaba muy ocupada con mi trabajo. + También me tomé un pequeño descanso xD, pero ya estoy de vuelta. + Todos los clips que ven hoy son del primer día xD, no jugué mucho. + Algunos clips no puedo publicarlos aquí porque tienen canciones con derechos de autor.

#bloxfruits #roblox

iw.title: אלוהים אדירים! בעל Blox Fruits קילל את השרת שלי + זה קרה..! ☠️
iw.description:
אלוהים אדירים! בעל Blox Fruits קילל את השרת שלי + זה קרה..! ☠️

+ סליחה שלא פרסמתי סרטון במשך 9 ימים, עסוק מדי בעבודה בחיים האמיתיים + לקחתי גם הפסקה קטנה xD אבל עכשיו חזרתי + כל הקטעים, מה שראיתם היום זה מהקליפ של היום הראשון xD לא שיחקתי הרבה + כמה קטעים אני לא יכול לפרסם כאן כי יש שם שיר עם זכויות יוצרים

#bloxfruits #roblox

nl-NL.title: OMG! De eigenaar van Blox Fruits heeft mijn server vervloekt + DIT IS ER GEBEURD..! ☠️
nl-NL.description:
OMG! De eigenaar van Blox Fruits heeft mijn server vervloekt + DIT is er gebeurd..! ☠️

+ Sorry dat ik 9 dagen geen video heb geplaatst, ik was te druk met mijn werk in het echte leven + ik heb ook even een pauze genomen xD maar nu ben ik terug + alle clips die je vandaag ziet, zijn van dag 1 xD ik heb niet veel gespeeld + sommige clips kan ik hier niet plaatsen omdat er auteursrechtelijk beschermde muziek in zit

#bloxfruits #roblox

ja.title: なんてことだ！Blox Fruitsのオーナーが私のサーバーに呪いをかけた！そしてこんなことが起こった…！☠️
ja.description:
なんてこった！Blox Fruitsのオーナーが私のサーバーに呪いをかけた！こんなことが起こった…！☠️

+ 9日間動画を投稿できなくてごめんなさい。現実の仕事が忙しかったんです。+ ちょっと休憩も取ってました xD でも今は戻ってきました + 今日お見せするクリップは全部初日のクリップです xD あまりプレイしていませんでした + 著作権のある曲が入っているので、ここに投稿できないクリップもあります

#bloxfruits #roblox

de-DE.title: Oh mein Gott! Der Besitzer von Blox Fruits hat meinen Server verflucht + DAS IST PASSIERT..! ☠️
de-DE.description:
OMG! Der Besitzer von Blox Fruits hat meinen Server verflucht + DAS IST PASSIERT..! ☠️

+ Tut mir leid, dass ich 9 Tage lang kein Video gepostet habe, ich war beruflich sehr eingespannt + Ich habe auch eine kleine Pause eingelegt xD Aber jetzt bin ich zurück + Alle Clips, die ihr heute seht, sind vom ersten Tag xD Ich habe nicht viel gespielt + Einige Clips kann ich hier nicht posten, da sie urheberrechtlich geschützte Musik enthalten

#bloxfruits #roblox

id.title: Ya ampun! Pemilik Blox Fruits mengutuk serverku + ini yang terjadi..! ☠️
id.description:
OMG! Pemilik Blox Fruits MENGUTUK SERVER SAYA + INI TERJADI..! ☠️

+ Maaf saya tidak mengunggah video selama 9 hari karena terlalu sibuk dengan pekerjaan di kehidupan nyata + Saya juga sempat istirahat sebentar xD tapi sekarang saya kembali + Semua klip yang kalian lihat hari ini berasal dari klip hari pertama xD Saya tidak banyak bermain + Beberapa klip tidak bisa saya unggah di sini karena ada lagu yang dilindungi hak cipta di dalamnya

#bloxfruits #roblox

ko.title: 세상에! 블록스 프루츠(Blox Fruits) 운영자가 내 서버에 저주를 걸었어! 이런 일이 벌어졌어..! ☠️
ko.description:
세상에! 블록스 프루츠 운영자가 제 서버에 저주를 걸었어요! 이런 일이 벌어졌어요..! ☠️

+ 9일 동안 영상을 올리지 못해서 죄송해요. 현실 생활에서 일하느라 너무 바빴고, 잠깐 쉬기도 했어요. xD 하지만 이제 돌아왔습니다. + 오늘 보시는 영상은 전부 첫날 영상이에요. xD 많이 플레이하진 않았거든요. + 저작권이 있는 노래가 포함된 영상은 여기에 올릴 수 없어요.

#bloxfruits #roblox

pl.title: O mój Boże! Właściciel Blox Fruits PRZEKLĄŁ MÓJ SERWER + TO SIĘ STAŁO...! ☠️
pl.description:
O mój Boże! Właściciel Blox Fruits PRZEKLĘŁ MÓJ SERWER + TO SIĘ STAŁO...! ☠️

+ Przepraszam, że nie wrzucałem filmów przez 9 dni, byłem zbyt zajęty pracą w realu + zrobiłem sobie też małą przerwę xD, ale teraz wróciłem + wszystkie klipy, które widzicie dzisiaj, pochodzą z pierwszego dnia xD Nie odtwarzały się zbyt wiele + niektóre klipy nie mogą się tu znaleźć, bo zawierają utwór chroniony prawami autorskimi

#bloxfruits #roblox

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Neele phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terе liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye…

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey we’ll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek ✖️ Swar — two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

ClassX RUSH Live – Final EP
Vek ✖️ Swar  one stage, one moment, one memory.

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

Sun, sun re piya
Ghum hai kahan, kahan tu?
Khaarijh ye dil
Tune kiya, kiya kyu?
Khabar nahi teri na aasraa
Guroor hai tera ya hai khataa meri
Mujhe bata de zara

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
Sun saawariya

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

(Hmm)
(Aaa)

Taare, sitaare saare
Maange hai tera pataa
Aur aadhe, adhoore vaade
Leke chal diye ho kahan?

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa

Ghoom ghoom ghoom

Movie: Raja Hindustani

Lyricist: Sameer

Lyrics:
Main Yeh Nahin Kehti Ke Pyaar Mat Karna

Maine Tumko Chaaha Tumse Pyaar Kiya
Sab Kuch Tum Pe Yaar Apna Vaar Diya

Sab Kuch Tum Pe Yaar Apna Vaar Diya
Ban Gayi Jogan Maine Preet Ka Jog Liya
Na Socha Na Samjha Dil Ka Rog Liya

Pardesi Mere Yaara Laut Ke Aana

Main Jagunga Neend Tumhein Na Aayegi
Har Pal Meri Yaad Tumhein Tadpayegi
Tadpayegi

Chhod Ke Aise Haal Mein Jo Tum Jaaoge Tum Jaaoge
Sach Kehta Hoon Jaan Bahut Pachhtaoge

snippet.title: Lat Lag Gayee - 8K | Race 2 | Saif Ali Khan, Jacqueline | Benny Dayal, Shalmali | Pritam |Party Song
snippet.description:
Get Ready to Groove 🎶💃! Experience the Electric Chemistry of Saif Ali Khan and Jacqueline Fernandez in the Sizzling 'Lat Lag Gayee' Song from Race 2. 🔥🕺 Let the Rhythmic Beats Ignite the Dance Floor as they Set it on Fire! 🔥🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Credits :
Singers : Benny Dayal & Shalmali Kholgade
Music Director : Pritam
Lyrics : Mayur Puri
Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai
Grooves and synths : Hyacinth D Souza with Aman Nath
Accordion - Milos Milivojevic with Nikhil Paul George 
Additional programming and Sound Design 
Dj Phukan with Sunny & Pritam
 
Movie Cast & Crew :
Film Cast : Saif Ali Khan, Deepika Padukone, John Abraham, Jacqueline Fernandez, Anil Kapoor & Ameesha Patel.
Directed by :  Abbas-Mustan
Produced By : Ramesh S. Taurani

Song Lyrics :

Be-Imaan
Dil Bada Be-Imaan
Hota Nahin Aasaan
Isey Hai Samjhana
 
Be-Imaan
Dil Bada Be-Imaan
Tere Liye Shaitan  
Meri Na Ik Maana...
 
Dil Jeetey Ya Main Jeetun
Dekhungi Dekhega Tu
Lo Dil Se Sharat Lag Gayee
 
Mujhe To Teri 
Lat Lag Gayee, Lag Gayee
Zamana Kahey Lat Ye Galat Lag Gayee

Mujhe To Teri Lat Lag Gayee, Lat Lag Gayee
Zamana Kahey Lat Ye Galat Lag Gayee
Mujhe To Teri

Rokun 
Jitna
Utni Bagawat Ho
Lagta Hai Aisa 
Haal Dil Ki Tum Zaroorat Ho...
 
Rokun
Jitna
Utni Bagawat Ho
Lagta Hai Aisa 
Haal Dil Ki Tum Zaroorat Ho...
 
Mujhko Bhi Tu Zaroori
Doobi Nashey Mein Poori
To Kaisi Ye Talab Lag Gayee?
 
Mujhe To Teri Lat Lag Gayee, Lag Gayee
Zamana Kahey Lat Ye Galat Lag Gayee

Mujhe To Teri Lat Lag Gayee, Lag Gayee
Zamana Kahey Lat Ye Galat Lag Gayee 
Mujhe To Teri
La Aa Aa Ye...
 
Ik Tu 
Ik Main
Ik Baat Huyi Apni
Hairaan Hai Kyun
Saara Jahaan
Jo Raat Huyi Apni...
 
Ik Tu
Ik Main
Ik Baat Huyi Apni
Hairaan Hai Kyun
Saara Jahaan
Jo Raat Huyi Apni...
 
Mujh Se Tu Aake Mila
To Ye Hua Hai Sila
Ki Sau Tohmat Lag Gayee

Vaaste Song: Dhvani Bhanushali, TanishkBagchi Nikhil D | Bhushan Kumar |RadhikaRao, Vinay Sapru

Singers : Dhvani Bhanushali & Nikhil D’Souza
Music : Tanishk Bagchi 
Lyrics: Arafat Mehmood
Featuring: Siddharth Gupta and Anuj Saini
Music Label - T-Series 
Video By - Radhika Rao & Vinay Sapru
Songs Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound Of Bombay) 
Mix Assistant Engineers - Michael Edwin Pillai
Special Thanks to Azeem Dayani

Vaaste Lyrics
Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du
Badle Mein Main Tere
Jo Khuda Khud Bhi De
Jannate Sach Kahu Chhod Du

Tumse Zaada Main Na Jaanu
Tumse Khud Ko Main Pehchanu
Tumko Bas Main Apna Maanu Mahiya

Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

Tere Alava Koi Bhi Khawish
Nahi Hai Baaki Dil Mein
Kadam Uthau Jaha Bhi Jaau
Tujhi Se Jaau Millne

Tere Liye Mera Safar
Tere Bina Main Jaau Kidhar

Tumse Zaada Main Na Jaanu
Tumse Khud Ko Main Pehchanu
Tumko Bas Main Apna Maanu Mahiya

Vaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

Badle Mein Main Tere
Jo Khuda Khud Bhi De
Jannate Sach Kahu Chhod Du

Tu Hi Hai Sawera Mera
Tu Hi Kinara Mera
Tu Hi Hai Dariya Mera
Khuda Ka Jariya Mera
Tujhi Se Hota Shuru
Ye Mera Kaarwan
Tujhi Pe Jaake Khatam
Ye Mera Saara Jaha

Vaaste Jaan Bhi Du
Main Gawah Emaan Bhi Du
Kismato Ka Likha Mod Du

snippet.title: Timi Cheumai - NepRiff ( Official Lyric Video )
snippet.description:
Some feelings don’t need loud words…
Sometimes, just being cheumai is enough. 🤍
“Timi Cheumai” is a soft emotional song about silent love, unspoken understanding, and the comfort of someone’s presence. When words fail, the heart speaks through silence. This song captures that quiet warmth — where love flows without noise.
Close your eyes, feel the melody, and let the emotions breathe. 🌙✨

snippet.title: Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old


Stream & Download "7 Years" by Lukas Graham: https://lukasgraham.ln...

Lets Support and Follow Lukas Graham:
https://www.instagram.com/lukasgraham
https://www.x.com/lukasgraham
https://www.facebook.com/lukasgraham

#7Years #LukasGraham #Lyrics #TikTok #Tiktokhymn

Lyrics:
Lukas Graham
"7 Years"

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

It was a big big world, but we thought we were bigger
Pushing each other to the limits, we were learning quicker
By eleven smoking herb and drinking burning liquor
Never rich so we were out to make that steady figure

Once I was eleven years old, my daddy told me
"Go get yourself a wife or you'll be lonely"
Once I was eleven years old

I always had that dream, like my daddy before me
So I started writing songs, I started writing stories
Something about that glory just always seemed to bore me
'Cause only those I really love will ever really know me

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
Before the morning sun, when life was lonely
Once I was twenty years old

(Lukas Graham!)

I only see my goals, I don't believe in failure
'Cause I know the smallest voices, they can make it major
I got my boys with me, at least those in favor
And if we don't meet before I leave, I hope I'll see you later

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
I was writing 'bout everything I saw before me
Once I was twenty years old

Soon we'll be thirty years old, our songs have been sold
We've traveled around the world and we're still roaming
Soon we'll be thirty years old

I'm still learning about life
My woman brought children for me
So I can sing them all my songs
And I can tell them stories
Most of my boys are with me
Some are still out seeking glory
And some I had to leave behind
My brother, I'm still sorry

Soon I'll be sixty years old, my daddy got sixty-one
Remember life, and then your life becomes a better one
I made a man so happy when I wrote a letter once
I hope my children come and visit once or twice a month

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

Once I was seven years old

📷 Image/Wallpaper Source: Unsplash.com

snippet.title: Uniq Poet - Overdue ft. MC Flo
snippet.description:
Artists: Uniq Poet ft. MC Flo
Written by: Uniq Poet & MC Flo
Produced by: Mr. Yoshi (MPC Live 2 & Suno)
Co-Produced, Mixed & Mastered by: Kpass

About the Track
"Overdue" is a collaboration between Uniq Poet and MC Flo, blending lyricism with a soulful, melodic foundation. Produced on the MPC Live 2 with vocal enhancements via Suno, the track represents Uniq Poet and MC Flo’s mindset as they traverse through a life where music is a constant battle between internal pressure and external expectation. It serves as a candid reflection on the feeling of having fallen short for the listeners, capturing the moment an artist faces their own perceived delays. MC Flo, a long-standing inspiration and peer on this shared path, enters with a verse that serves as a catalyst, injecting the "can-do" mentality needed to break the silence and pull the narrative back into the light.

“Every line I write is a dedication long overdue!”

snippet.title: Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Player Civilization
snippet.description:
435th eggchan hostage situation 

Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Player Civilization

Unstable SMP:
➜  @FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨@ParrotX2  
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prey - Beutezug https://youtu.be/TqrNKC7kybk by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

snippet.title: MY GAMING CONSOLE COLLECTION
snippet.description:
MY GAMING CONSOLE COLLECTION
#console #technogamerz #ujjwal 

In this video, I’m sharing my complete console collection that includes gaming devices from different generations. From classic retro gaming memories to modern high performance systems, this collection shows how gaming has evolved over the years. Some of these are nostalgic pieces that many of us grew up playing, while others represent the latest technology in handheld and console gaming. Watch till the end to see the full collection and let me know which one from this lineup is your favorite.

Share, Support, Subscribe!

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ujjwalgamer/

snippet.title: I Checked Old Free Fire YouTubers’ IDs 😱 Who Quit Free Fire – Garena Free Fire
snippet.description:
I Checked Old Free Fire YouTubers’ IDs 😱 Who Quit Free Fire – Garena Free Fire

In this video, I checked the IDs of some old Free Fire YouTubers who were once very popular in the community! 😱 These creators had millions of subscribers, rare items, and legendary collections, but many of them suddenly quit Free Fire.
So I decided to search their Free Fire IDs and see what their accounts look like today. Are they still playing? Do they still have their rare items? Or did they completely leave the game? 
Watch till the end to see the rare collections, old badges, and shocking details from these legendary Free Fire accounts!

LIKE 👍, COMMENT 💬, and SUBSCRIBE 🔔 for more amazing Free Fire content.

snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

6, mutu jhiki dim jasto bhako chha 
  kaha dekham ra kaha bhetam bhako chha 

7,  matoko ghar  khusiko  chhano 
  tadhaa huda mutumai bhakkano

8, Timro jobaan Deu mmero haatma 
   Barbarauna  thalechhu  raatma 

9, Hunna maaya rupranga  Oth heri 
   Hasi hasi dinchhu ki chot feri 

10, kasle bhanchha chhutida Attinna 
  Yaad le  jati raksile maatinna..

Huri batasa  mayalu kata chha lagchha hatasa , mayalu kata chha lagchha Atyas...

Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi

Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi

Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana

Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

localized.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentine’s Special Love Song
localized.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima
